summary: Completed testing of iteration 12 features: Enterprise cover_image, Media Gallery (photos/videos), notification links with tab parameters, Services/Products CRUD, and dashboard tab parameter support. All backend tests passed (21/21). Frontend features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Enterprise cover_image field properly saves and displays on homepage cards
Media Gallery section has Photos and Videos tabs with upload/add functionality
Photos can be uploaded via drag-drop or click (JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP, max 10MB)
Videos can be added via YouTube/Vimeo URLs or direct links
Notification dropdown shows order and job application notifications
Notification links use correct ?tab= parameter format for dashboard navigation
Services/Products CRUD working with create, update, delete operations
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration12_features.py - Created comprehensive test file for iteration 12 features
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features fully tested: 1) Enterprise cover_image saves via PUT /api/enterprises/{id} and displays on EnterpriseCard component, 2) Media Gallery section at ?tab=media allows photo uploads and YouTube video URL additions, 3) Photos/videos stored in enterprise.photos[] and enterprise.videos[] arrays, 4) Notifications have 'link' field with ?tab= parameter for dashboard navigation, 5) Services/Products CRUD via /api/services-products endpoints, 6) Dashboard tab parameters work for both enterprise (?tab=media, profile, services, orders, applications) and client (?tab=jobs, orders) dashboards.

features_tested.enterprise_cover_image: ✓ Saves and displays on homepage cards
features_tested.media_gallery_photos: ✓ Upload area, photos array management, delete functionality
features_tested.media_gallery_videos: ✓ YouTube URL input, videos array management, delete functionality
features_tested.services_products_crud: ✓ Create, read, update, delete operations working
features_tested.enterprise_dashboard_tab_param: ✓ ?tab=media, profile, services, orders, applications all work

api_tests_passed: GET /api/enterprises/{id} - Has cover_image, photos, videos fields
GET /api/enterprises - List includes cover_image for cards
GET /api/notifications - Returns notifications with link field
